- Assign domain-best employees to highest-reward tasks
- ALWAYS accept+assign+dispatch in SAME TURN — no delays or tasks fail

- Helix Systems: PREMIUM — trust high (5+), reliable, good messages, completed many tasks

- Assign domain-best employees to highest-reward tasks

## Best Employee-Domain Matching
- data_environment: Emp_6 (6.67), Emp_7 (6.13), Emp_4 (4.16), Emp_1 (3.35), Emp_2 (3.06), Emp_3 (2.96)
- inference: Emp_4 (5.85), Emp_7 (5.63), Emp_6 (4.37), Emp_2 (3.94), Emp_8 (3.54), Emp_5 (2.49)
- research: Emp_4 (6.32), Emp_6 (5.39), Emp_7 (4.91), Emp_8 (3.84), Emp_2 (3.72)
- training: Emp_6 (5.99), Emp_7 (5.18), Emp_4 (4.20), Emp_8 (3.92)

## Standard Team Assignments
- data_env tasks: Emp_6,Emp_7,Emp_1,Emp_3 (mids + juniors)
- inference tasks: Emp_4,Emp_7,Emp_2,Emp_8 (2 mids + juniors)
- research tasks: Emp_4,Emp_6,Emp_8,Emp_2 (2 mids + juniors)

## Client Trust & Reliability (May 27, 2025)
- Cortex Intelligence: PREMIUM — trust~5.0+, HIGH successes — ALWAYS PRIORITIZE
- Helix Systems: PREMIUM — trust~5.0+, HIGH successes — ALWAYS PRIORITIZE
- Stratos Cloud: PREMIUM — trust~5.0+, HIGH successes — ALWAYS PRIORITIZE
- Prism Analytics: SKIP — 66.7% failure rate
- Vanguard ML: SKIP ALWAYS — scope changes
- Equinox Labs: SKIP ALWAYS — risky

## Financial State (May 27, 2025)
- Funds: ~$1.718M, Payroll: ~$60,515/mo, Runway: ~28.4 months
- Horizon ends: 2026-01-01 (~7.1 months remaining)
- Active (14): data_env: 12,65001,167001,161004,131003,65002,41003 | inference: 114005,197002,167000,151010,72005,167002,193011

## Task Tiers (current market)
- Tier 0 (BEST): $21K-$25K+ — prestige=4, trust=4 (Stratos/Helix/Cortex)
- Tier 1: $13K-$17K — prestige=3-4, trust=0-4
- Tier 2: $8K-$13K — prestige=2-3, trust=0-2
- SKIP: Vanguard, Equinox, Prism tasks

## Key Rules
- ALWAYS: accept -> inspect domain -> assign best employees -> dispatch — all same turn
- Always keep 12-14 tasks active concurrently (all employees busy)
- Prioritize: Prestige-4 ($25K+) > Prestige-3 ($13K+) > Tier2 ($8K+) > skip rest
- LARGE TASKS (600+ units): MUST include at least 1 mid employee!
- LARGE TASKS (1000+ units): Need full team (4+ employees) with mids
- Small tasks (<600 units): 2 mids in split OK, or juniors only if ample time
- Pre-accept tasks before current ones finish for zero-downtime transitions
- DEADLINE MATH: always verify remaining_qty / (combined_rate/sqrt(N)) < hours_to_deadline!
- Best data_env team: Emp_6+7+1+3 (rates: 6.67+6.13+3.35+2.96=19.11, /sqrt(N) for splits)
- Best inference team: Emp_4+7+2+8 (rates: 5.85+5.63+3.94+3.54=18.96)
- Best research team: Emp_4+6+8+2 (rates: 6.32+5.39+3.84+3.72=19.27)
